## What this PR changes

<!-- One short sentence. Reference any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, broken link, clarification)
- [ ] i18n update (translation correction or new language)
- [ ] Client example (new SDK snippet, fix to existing example)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry only
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Verification

<!-- How did you check the change? Examples:
     - "Rendered locally with `npx markdownlint *.md` — 0 warnings."
     - "Ran the snippet against `mcp.gapup.io/mcp` — got expected response."
     - "Translated by a native speaker (me)."

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is scoped to docs / examples / i18n (no server code).
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] If I touched `README.md` content, I flagged the i18n READMEs that need a follow-up (or updated them).
- [ ] Commit message follows Conventional Commits (`docs:`, `fix(readme):`, `chore(i18n):`, …).
- [ ] No secrets, no PII, no production tokens in the diff.
